mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_tag_preference WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY score DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_tag_preference (user_id, tag_name, score, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tagName}, #{score}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE score = score + #{score}, updated_at = NOW()
INSERT INTO user_behavior_log (user_id, novel_id, behavior_type, weight, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{novelId}, #{behaviorType}, #{weight}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT tag_name, COUNT(*) as count FROM novel_tag GROUP BY tag_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT DISTINCT tag_name FROM novel_tag ORDER BY tag_name
SELECT tag_category, tag_name FROM novel_tag GROUP BY tag_name, tag_category ORDER BY tag_category, tag_name
